title: Dynamic Response of a Finite Circular Plate on an Elastic Half-Space Using the Truncated Lamb Kernel
summary: We develop an exact operator formulation for the dynamic interaction between a finite circular elastic plate and an elastic half-space. Classical analyses, beginning with Lamb's representation of the half-space response, typically assume an infinite plate and rely on diagonalization of the soil operator via the continuous Hankel transform. For a plate of finite radius $R$, however, both traction and displacement are supported only on $0 \le r \le R$, leading to the spatially truncated Lamb operator \[ \mathscr{M}(ω) = χ_{[0,R]} \, T(ω)\, χ_{[0,R]}, \] where $T(ω)$ is the Hankel multiplier involving the Rayleigh denominator $Ω(ξ,ω)$. Truncation destroys the diagonal structure of $T(ω)$ and introduces real-axis singularities associated with the Rayleigh pole, in addition to square-root branch points at $ξ= k_T$ and $ξ= k_L$. We represent the action of $\mathscr{M}(ω)$ on a finite-disk Bessel basis $\{ φ_n(r) = A_{1,n} J_0(λ_n r) + A_{2,n} I_0(λ_n r)\},$ which satisfies the free-edge boundary conditions of the plate, and derive explicit expressions for the resulting matrix elements. These involve integrals of the Lamb kernel evaluated as Cauchy principal values, with residue contributions corresponding to radiation damping in the half-space. The resulting operator matrix is dense but spectrally convergent. Its inversion yields a complete frequency-domain solution for finite-radius plates. The analysis reproduces Chen et al.'s finite-radius experiments for small $R$, approaches the infinite-radius limit as $R \to \infty$, and quantifies finite-radius corrections. To our knowledge, this is the first exact operator-level treatment of finite-radius plate-half-space interaction that retains the full nonlocal Lamb kernel.

AI.tldr: 建立了有限半径弹性圆板与弹性半空间动态相互作用的精确算子公式，解决了经典无限板近似的局限性。
AI.motivation: 经典分析通常假设无限板，使用连续Hankel变换对角化土壤算子，但对于有限半径板，截断破坏了算子的对角结构并引入奇异性，需要新的数学框架。
AI.techniques: 使用空间截断Lamb算子、有限圆盘Bessel基展开、Cauchy主值积分、留数贡献分析、谱收敛稠密矩阵求逆等算子方法。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了有限半径板-半空间相互作用的精确算子公式，推导了矩阵元素显式表达式，证明了谱收敛性，提供了完整的频域解。
AI.significance: 首次在算子层面精确处理有限半径板-半空间相互作用，保留了完整的非局部Lamb核，为结构动力学和地震工程提供了精确分析工具。

title: Quantitative light-particle limit for the Vlasov-Fokker-Planck-Navier-Stokes system
summary: We investigate the hydrodynamic limit of the Vlasov--Fokker--Planck--Navier--Stokes system in the light particle regime, where the particle relaxation takes place on a singularly fast time scale. Using a relative entropy method adapted to this scaling, we develop the first quantitative convergence theory for the light particle limit. Our analysis yields explicit rates for the convergence of both the kinetic distribution and the fluid velocity, extending the qualitative compactness-based result of Goudon, Jabin, and Vasseur [Indiana Univ. Math. J., 53, (2004), 1495--1515]. Moreover, we show that these quantitative estimates propagate in weak topologies and, in particular, lead to optimal convergence rates in the bounded Lipschitz distance. The results apply on both the torus and the whole space, providing a unified quantitative description of the light particle hydrodynamic limit.

AI.tldr: 首次建立了Vlasov-Fokker-Planck-Navier-Stokes系统在轻粒子极限下的定量收敛理论，给出了明确的收敛速率。
AI.motivation: 研究Vlasov-Fokker-Planck-Navier-Stokes系统在轻粒子极限下的流体动力学极限，其中粒子弛豫发生在奇异快速时间尺度上，旨在从定性结果推进到定量理论。
AI.techniques: 采用适应此标度的相对熵方法，在弱拓扑中传播定量估计，使用有界Lipschitz距离获得最优收敛速率。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了轻粒子极限的首次定量收敛理论，给出了动能分布和流体速度的显式收敛速率，推广了Goudon等人的定性紧性结果。
AI.significance: 提供了轻粒子流体动力学极限的统一定量描述，适用于环面和全空间，为多尺度流体-粒子耦合系统的定量分析提供了新工具。

title: The Łojasiewicz-Simon inequality related to grain boundary motion and its applications
summary: In this paper, we study the Łojasiewicz-Simon gradient inequality for the mathematical model of grain boundary motion. We first derive a curve shortening equation with time-dependent mobility, which guarantees the energy dissipation law for the grain boundary energy, including the difference between orientations of the constituent grains as a state variable. Next, we discuss the Łojasiewicz-Simon gradient inequality for the grain boundary energy. Finally, we give applications of the inequality to the energy.

AI.tldr: 建立了晶界运动数学模型的Łojasiewicz-Simon梯度不等式，并应用于能量分析
AI.motivation: 研究晶界运动的数学模型，特别是能量耗散结构和梯度流性质，旨在建立适用于晶界能量的Łojasiewicz-Simon不等式
AI.techniques: 推导具有时间依赖迁移率的曲线缩短方程，分析能量耗散律，建立Łojasiewicz-Simon梯度不等式，应用变分分析和几何偏微分方程方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了保证晶界能量耗散的曲线缩短方程；2. 证明了晶界能量的Łojasiewicz-Simon梯度不等式；3. 给出了不等式在能量分析中的应用
AI.significance: 为晶界动力学提供了严格的数学框架，建立了梯度不等式这一重要分析工具，对材料科学中的晶界运动理论有重要贡献

title: A Fokker-Planck equation with superlinear drift at infinity for Integrate-and-Fire model
summary: The Integrate-and-Fire model is a Fokker-Planck equation arising in neuroscience. It describes the evolution of the probability density of the neuronal membrane potential and fitting has shown that the inclusion of a em superlinear drift provides the most realistic description. To make sense of this, we propose to set the equation on the full line, the neural activity being described by the flux at infinity. This framework serves as a model extension of the classical Noisy Integrate-and-Fire model, with a fixed firing potential. We first establish the well-posedness of the solution, establish the boundary condition at infinity which is the major difficulty. Then, state rigorously the entropy dissipation property. Finally, using Doeblin's method, we prove the exponential convergence of the solution toward the unique stationary state in full generality.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个在整条实线上定义的Integrate-and-Fire模型的扩展框架，建立了适定性、熵耗散性质，并证明了向唯一稳态的指数收敛性。
AI.motivation: 神经科学中的Integrate-and-Fire模型是一个Fokker-Planck方程，描述神经元膜电位的概率密度演化。经验拟合表明包含超线性漂移项能提供最现实的描述，但需要建立适当的数学框架来处理这种扩展模型。
AI.techniques: 将方程设置在整条实线上，将神经活动描述为无穷远处的通量；建立无穷远处的边界条件；利用熵耗散性质；采用Doeblin方法证明指数收敛性。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 解的存在唯一性（适定性）；2) 无穷远处边界条件的严格建立；3) 熵耗散性质的严格表述；4) 解向唯一稳态的指数收敛性（使用Doeblin方法）。
AI.significance: 为包含超线性漂移的Integrate-and-Fire模型提供了严格的数学框架，扩展了经典模型，建立了完整的适定性理论和长期行为分析，对神经科学中的概率建模有重要理论意义。

title: Remarks on well-posedness for linear elliptic equations via divergence-free transformation
summary: This paper investigates the well-posedness of linear elliptic equations, focusing on the divergence-free transformation introduced in the author's recent work [J. Math. Anal. Appl. 548 (2025), 129425]. By comparing this approach with classical bilinear form methods, we demonstrate that while standard techniques encounter limitations in handling zero-order coefficients $c \in L^1(U)$, the divergence-free transformation successfully establishes well-posedness in this setting. Furthermore, utilizing the Riesz-Thorin interpolation theorem between the cases $c \in L^1(U)$ and $c \in L^{\frac{2d}{d+2}}(U)$, we establish the existence and uniqueness of weak solutions under the assumption $c \in L^s(U)$ for $s \in [1, \frac{2d}{d+2}]$.

AI.tldr: 通过散度自由变换方法，建立了线性椭圆方程在低正则性系数c∈L¹(U)下的适定性，突破了传统双线性形式方法的限制。
AI.motivation: 研究线性椭圆方程的适定性问题，特别是当零阶系数c具有低正则性（c∈L¹(U)）时，传统双线性形式方法存在局限性，需要新的分析框架。
AI.techniques: 散度自由变换方法（作者先前工作引入）、Riesz-Thorin插值定理、弱解理论、与传统双线性形式方法的比较分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于c∈L¹(U)，散度自由变换方法成功建立适定性；2. 通过插值得到c∈L^s(U)（s∈[1, 2d/(d+2)]）时弱解的存在唯一性。
AI.significance: 突破了传统方法对系数正则性的要求，扩展了椭圆方程适定性理论的应用范围，为处理低正则性系数问题提供了新工具。

title: On blow up NLS with a multiplicative noise
summary: It is of significant interest to understand whether a noise will speed up or prevent blow up. Under certain nondegenerate conditions, \cite{dD2005Blowup} proved a multiplicative noise will speed up blow up of NLS, in the sense that, blow up can happen in any short time with positive probability. We prove that such probability is indeed quite small, and provide a large deviation type upper bound.

AI.tldr: 证明了随机非线性薛定谔方程中乘性噪声加速爆破的概率实际上非常小，并给出了大偏差类型上界估计。
AI.motivation: 研究随机非线性薛定谔方程中乘性噪声对爆破现象的影响，特别关注噪声是加速还是阻止爆破的问题。已有研究表明在非退化条件下，乘性噪声会加速爆破（以正概率在任意短时间内发生爆破），本文旨在量化这种加速爆破的概率大小。
AI.techniques: 使用大偏差理论方法，建立概率估计的上界；可能涉及随机偏微分方程理论、爆破时间分析、概率测度估计等技术。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了乘性噪声加速爆破的概率实际上非常小，并给出了该概率的大偏差类型上界估计，量化了爆破时间分布的概率衰减速率。
AI.significance: 深化了对随机偏微分方程中噪声与爆破现象相互作用的理解，提供了更精细的概率量化结果，为随机非线性波动方程的爆破行为分析提供了新的理论工具和视角。

title: A sharp monomial Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg inequality
summary: We consider a monomial Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg inequality, find the optimal constant and classify the optimizers under an integrated curvature dimension condition. We take advantage of the $Γ$-calculus to exploit geometrical techniques to tackle the problem and regularity results to justify some integration by parts. A symmetry-breaking result is also provided.

AI.tldr: 在积分曲率维数条件下，建立了单项式Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式的最优常数和优化子分类
AI.motivation: 研究Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式在几何条件下的最优常数和优化子分类问题，该不等式是Sobolev不等式的重要推广，在偏微分方程和几何分析中有广泛应用
AI.techniques: 使用Γ-演算（Γ-calculus）等几何技术，结合正则性结果来验证分部积分的合理性，并利用积分曲率维数条件
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在积分曲率维数条件下得到单项式Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式的最优常数；2. 对优化子进行分类；3. 给出了对称性破缺的结果
AI.significance: 将几何分析与泛函不等式结合，在更一般的几何条件下研究Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式，为理解几何约束下的最优函数空间嵌入提供了新视角

title: Existence of Weak Solutions to a Constrained Aggregation-Diffusion-Reaction Model for Multiple Sclerosis
summary: We establish an existence result for weak solutions to an aggregation-diffusion-reaction equation with a constraint, arising in the modelling of multiple sclerosis. The model is derived from a general chemotaxis-type framework and describes the time evolution of the density of activated macrophages, which is subject to attraction by oligodendrocytes. The latter are governed by a constraint equation. The proof relies on a variational splitting scheme that isolates the transport (aggregation-diffusion) and reaction contributions. The structure of the constraint makes it possible to recover the oligodendrocyte density as the limit of a sequence of characteristic functions.

AI.tldr: 建立了多发性硬化症模型中带约束的聚集-扩散-反应方程弱解的存在性结果
AI.motivation: 研究多发性硬化症建模中的数学问题，该模型从一般趋化型框架推导而来，描述活化巨噬细胞密度的时间演化，这些细胞受少突胶质细胞的吸引，而后者受约束方程控制
AI.techniques: 变分分裂方案分离传输（聚集-扩散）和反应贡献，利用约束结构将少突胶质细胞密度恢复为特征函数序列的极限
AI.main_theorems: 建立了带约束的聚集-扩散-反应方程弱解的存在性定理
AI.significance: 为多发性硬化症的生物数学模型提供了严格的数学基础，发展了处理约束方程的新方法，对趋化型方程理论有贡献

title: Dissipative Solutions to a Compressible Non-Newtonian Korteweg System with Density-Dependent Viscous Stress Tensor
summary: The main objective of this paper is to prove that if capillarity effect is taken into account then there exist dissipative solutions to a system describing viscoplastic compressible flows with density dependent viscosities in a periodic domain $\T^d$ with $d=2,3$. We calculate the relative entropy inequality and in consequence show existence of dissipative solutions and the weak-strong uniqueness for this system. Our result extends the recent result concerning the link between Euler--Korteweg and Navier--Stokes--Korteweg systems for Newtonian flows (when the viscosity depends on the density) [See D.~Bresch, M. Gisclon, I. Lacroix-Violet, {\it Arch. Rational Mech. Anal.} (2019)] to non-Newtonian flows.

AI.tldr: 证明了考虑毛细管效应时，具有密度依赖粘度的粘塑性可压缩流存在耗散解
AI.motivation: 研究粘塑性可压缩流体的数学模型，考虑毛细管效应和密度依赖的粘度，在周期性区域中建立解的存在性理论
AI.techniques: 相对熵不等式方法，耗散解理论，弱-强唯一性证明，将牛顿流体结果推广到非牛顿流体
AI.main_theorems: 证明了耗散解的存在性，建立了相对熵不等式，证明了弱-强唯一性
AI.significance: 将Bresch等人的牛顿流体结果推广到非牛顿流体，为粘塑性可压缩流提供严格的数学理论框架

title: Integral equation methods for scattering by general compact obstacles: wavenumber-explicit estimates
summary:
There has been significant recent interest in understanding the dependence on the wavenumber, $k$, of boundary integral operators (BIOs), supported on some set $Γ\subset \mathbb{R}^n$, that arise in the solution of BVPs for the Helmholtz equation, $Δu + k^2 u=0$. Recently, for the Dirichlet BVP with data $g$, Caetano et al (2025) have proposed an integral equation (IE) $A_kφ=g$ that applies for arbitrary compact $Γ$. This formulation is a generalisation of standard first kind IEs, where the BIO is $S_k$, the single-layer BIO on a surface $Γ$, that apply when $Γ$ is the boundary of a Lipschitz domain or a screen.
  In this paper we study the dependence of $A_k$ on $k$, showing that, for $k\geq k_0>0$, $\|A_k\|\leq ck$ while $\|A_k^{-1}\| \leq c'k$ if $Γ$ is star-shaped, where $c, c'>0$ depend only on $k_0$ and $Γ$. Amongst other bounds we also show that: (i) on the one hand, given any mildly increasing unbounded positive sequence $(k_m)$ and any unbounded sequence $(a_m)$, there exists $Γ$, with connected complement, such that $\|A_{k_m}^{-1}\|\geq a_m$ for every $m$; (ii) on the other hand, for every $Γ\subset \mathbb{R}^n$ and $k_0,\varepsilon, δ>0$, there exists $c>0$ and $E\subset [k_0,\infty)$, with Lebesgue measure $m(E)\leq \varepsilon$, such that $\|A_{k}^{-1}\|\leq c k^{2n+2+δ}$ on $[k_0,\infty)\setminus E$, i.e., the growth of $\|A_{k}^{-1}\|$ is at worst polynomial in $k$ if one avoids a set $E$ of arbitrarily small measure.
  As a corollary of these results we obtain the first $k$-explicit bounds on $\|S_k^{-1}\|$ and the condition number of $S_k$ for the case that $Γ$ is the boundary of a Lipschitz domain, or a screen not contained in a hyperplane, and analogous estimates for the case that $Γ$ is a $d$-set (and so of Hausdorff dimension $d$), for non-integer values of $d$.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了Helmholtz方程边界积分算子A_k关于波数k的依赖性，给出了算子范数和逆算子范数的显式k依赖估计。
AI.motivation: 研究Helmholtz方程边界积分算子(BIOs)关于波数k的依赖性，特别是Caetano等人(2025)提出的适用于任意紧集Γ的积分方程A_kφ=g的k依赖性分析。
AI.techniques: 使用边界积分算子理论、谱分析、测度论方法（避免小测度集）、几何分析（星形域性质）、以及泛函分析中的算子范数估计技术。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果包括：1) 对星形Γ，‖A_k‖≤ck且‖A_k^{-1}‖≤c'k；2) 存在Γ使得逆算子范数任意大；3) 对任意Γ，除去任意小测度集后，逆算子范数增长至多为多项式阶k^{2n+2+δ}。
AI.significance: 首次给出了Lipschitz域边界或屏幕情形下单层位势算子S_k逆的显式k依赖估计，为高频Helmholtz问题的数值方法提供了理论依据，并推广到分形集（d-集）情形。

title: On some nonlocal, nonlinear diffusion problems
summary: This note is devoted to some nonlocal, nonlinear elliptic problems with an emphasis on the computation of the solution of such problems, reducing it in particular to a fixed point argument in R. Errors estimates and numerical experiments are provided.

AI.tldr: 提出并分析非局部非线性椭圆问题的数值计算方法，通过不动点论证将问题约化到实数域
AI.motivation: 研究非局部非线性椭圆问题的计算求解方法，这类问题在数学物理中有广泛应用但计算困难
AI.techniques: 不动点论证、数值分析、误差估计、数值实验验证
AI.main_theorems: 将非局部非线性椭圆问题约化为实数域上的不动点问题，提供误差估计和数值实验结果
AI.significance: 为非局部非线性椭圆问题的数值求解提供有效方法，具有理论和计算应用价值

title: Mode stability of self-similar wave maps without symmetry in higher dimensions
summary: We consider wave maps from $(1+d)$-dimensional Minkowski space into the $d$-sphere. For every $d \geq 3$, there exists an explicit self-similar solution that exhibits finite time blowup. This solution is corotational and its mode stability in the class of corotational functions is known. Recently, Weissenbacher, Koch, and the first author proved mode stability without symmetry assumptions in $d =3$. In this paper we extend this result to all $d \geq 4$. On a technical level, this is the first successful implementation of the quasi-solution method where two additional parameters are present.

AI.tldr: 证明了波映射到d-球面的自相似爆破解在所有维度d≥4下的无对称假设模式稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究波映射从(1+d)维Minkowski空间到d-球面的自相似爆破解的稳定性问题，特别是去除对称性假设后的模式稳定性
AI.techniques: 准解方法（quasi-solution method），首次成功实现了包含两个额外参数的情况
AI.main_theorems: 将波映射自相似爆破解的模式稳定性结果从d=3推广到所有d≥4，且无需对称性假设
AI.significance: 首次在准解方法中成功处理两个额外参数，为波映射爆破解的稳定性分析提供了新工具，扩展了现有理论框架

title: Blowup stability of wave maps without symmetry
summary: We study wave maps from $(1+d)$-dimensional Minkowski space into the $d$-sphere without any symmetry assumptions. There exists an explicit self-similar blowup solution and we prove that this solution is asymptotically stable under small perturbations of the initial data. The proof is fully rigorous and requires no numerical input whatsoever.

AI.tldr: 证明了从(1+d)维闵可夫斯基时空到d维球面的波映射的自相似爆破解在小扰动下的渐近稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究波映射方程（从(1+d)维闵可夫斯基时空到d维球面）的爆破行为，特别是自相似爆破解的稳定性问题。波映射是几何波动方程的重要例子，其爆破机制是PDE理论中的核心问题。
AI.techniques: 采用完全严格的数学分析，无需任何数值计算。可能涉及能量估计、相似变量变换、线性化分析、谱理论以及非线性稳定性分析等PDE技术。
AI.main_theorems: 存在显式的自相似爆破解，并且证明该解在初始数据的小扰动下是渐近稳定的。这意味着小扰动不会改变解的爆破机制，爆破仍以自相似形式发生。
AI.significance: 这是波映射爆破理论的重要进展，首次在没有对称性假设下证明了自相似爆破的稳定性，为理解非线性波动方程的奇点形成机制提供了严格数学基础。

title: $Γ$-convergence and homogenisation for free discontinuity functionals with linear growth in the space of functions with bounded deformation
summary: We study the $Γ$-convergence of sequences of free discontinuity functionals with linear growth defined in the space ${\rm BD}$ of functions with bounded deformation. We prove a compactness result with respect to $Γ$-convergence and outline the main properties of the $Γ$-limits, which lead to an integral representation result. The corresponding integrands are obtained by taking limits of suitable minimisation problems on small cubes. These results are then used to study the deterministic and stochastic homogenisation problem for a large class of free discontinuity functionals defined in ${\rm BD}$.

AI.tldr: 研究了BD空间中具有线性增长的自由不连续性泛函的Γ收敛性，建立了紧致性定理并给出了积分表示，应用于确定性和随机均匀化问题
AI.motivation: 研究BD（有界变形）空间中具有线性增长的自由不连续性泛函的Γ收敛理论，这类泛函在断裂力学、图像分割和材料科学中有重要应用，需要建立系统的收敛理论来处理不连续性
AI.techniques: Γ收敛理论、紧致性方法、积分表示理论、极小化问题在小立方体上的极限分析、确定性和随机均匀化技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. Γ收敛的紧致性定理；2. Γ极限的积分表示定理；3. 通过小立方体上极小化问题极限构造被积函数；4. 确定性和随机均匀化问题的解
AI.significance: 扩展了自由不连续性泛函的Γ收敛理论到BD空间，为断裂力学和材料科学中的均匀化问题提供了严格的数学框架，特别是处理具有不连续性的材料微结构

title: On the asymptotic behavior of the Repulsive Pressureless Euler-Poisson System
summary: The main objective of this paper is a study of the asymptotic behavior of distributional solutions to the one-dimensional repulsive pressureless Euler-Poisson system. The system is a model for the dynamics of a mass distribution evolving on \mathbb{R} whose masses exert outward forces on one another. A discrete (describing the evolution of finitely many particles) solution is called sticky if, upon collision, particles stick together and move as one for all subsequent time, according to the conservation of mass and momentum principles. We prove results on the total energy (Hamiltonian) of the system and demonstrate the existence and uniqueness of so-called "perfect" states, where the Hamiltonian is constant over all time and the solution converges to equilibrium, a single stationary particle. We provide a necessary and a sufficient condition for finite-time collapse, and present a quadratic envelope within which a solution must remain in order to collapse. We demonstrate various (counter)examples that illustrate the unique behavior of the repulsive scheme with the sticky condition, analytically and with a computer simulation.

AI.tldr: 研究一维排斥性无压欧拉-泊松系统的分布解渐近行为，特别关注粘性解和完美状态的存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究质量分布在一维空间演化时相互施加排斥力的动力学模型，该系统描述有限粒子演化，当粒子碰撞时粘合在一起，根据质量和动量守恒原理继续运动
AI.techniques: 使用粘性解概念、哈密顿量（总能量）分析、有限时间坍缩条件、二次包络方法，结合解析证明和计算机模拟
AI.main_theorems: 证明了系统总能量的结果，展示了"完美"状态的存在唯一性（哈密顿量恒定且收敛到平衡态），给出了有限时间坍缩的必要和充分条件，提出了解必须保持的二次包络
AI.significance: 深入理解排斥性粘性系统的渐近行为，为无压欧拉-泊松系统提供新的数学分析框架，揭示粘性条件对系统动力学的影响

title: Universality in the Low Mach number limit via a convex integration framework
summary: We study the low Mach number limit of the compressible Euler equations through the lens of convex integration. For any prescribed $L^2$ weak solution of the incompressible Euler equations, we construct a corresponding family of weak solutions to the compressible Euler equations via a refined convex integration scheme. We then prove that, as the Mach number tends to zero, this family of solutions converges strongly to the given incompressible solution. This result demonstrates that the incompressible system acts as a universal attractor in this setting: every incompressible flow can be realized as the limit of convex integration solutions to the compressible system. Our approach highlights a new form of universality for singular limits and provides a rigorous framework for understanding the incompressible limit from the perspective of weak solution theory.

AI.tldr: 通过凸积分方法证明可压缩欧拉方程的低马赫数极限中，不可压缩系统作为普适吸引子存在
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩欧拉方程在低马赫数极限下的行为，特别是从弱解理论角度理解不可压缩极限的普适性
AI.techniques: 精炼的凸积分方案，用于构造可压缩欧拉方程的弱解族，并证明其强收敛性
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意给定的不可压缩欧拉方程的L^2弱解，都能构造对应的可压缩欧拉方程弱解族，且当马赫数趋于零时强收敛到给定不可压缩解
AI.significance: 揭示了不可压缩系统作为普适吸引子的性质，为奇异极限的普适性提供了新形式，建立了从弱解理论理解不可压缩极限的严格框架

title: Methods in studying qualitative properties of fractional equations
summary:
In this paper, we systematically review a series of effective methods for studying the qualitative properties of solutions to fractional equations. Beginning with the pioneering extension method and the method of moving planes in integral forms, we introduce a variety of direct methods, including the direct method of moving planes, the method of moving spheres, blow-up and rescaling techniques, the sliding method, regularity lifting, and approaches for interior and boundary regularity estimates.
  To elucidate the core ideas behind these methods, we employ simple examples that demonstrate how they can be applied to investigate qualitative properties of solutions. We also provide a comparative discussion of their respective strengths and limitations. It is our hope that this paper will serve as a useful handbook for researchers engaged in the study of fractional equations.

AI.tldr: 这是一篇关于分数阶方程解定性性质研究方法的系统性综述论文
AI.motivation: 分数阶方程在数学物理、金融数学、图像处理等领域广泛应用，研究其解的定性性质（如对称性、单调性、正则性等）具有重要理论和应用价值，需要系统整理相关研究方法
AI.techniques: 扩展方法、积分形式的移动平面法、直接移动平面法、移动球面法、爆破与重标度技术、滑动方法、正则性提升、内点和边界正则性估计方法
AI.main_theorems: 本文是综述性论文，主要贡献在于系统性地整理和比较了分数阶方程解定性性质的各种研究方法，而非提出新的定理
AI.significance: 为分数阶方程研究者提供了全面的方法手册，比较了不同方法的优缺点，有助于推动该领域的发展和应用

title: A general theory of nonlocal elasticity based on nonlocal gradients and connections with Eringen's model
summary: We develop a general theory of nonlocal linear elasticity based on nonlocal gradients with general radial kernels. Starting from a nonlocal hyperelastic energy functional, we perform a formal linearization around the identity deformation to obtain a system of nonlocal linear elasticity equations. We establish the existence and uniqueness of weak solutions for both Dirichlet and Neumann boundary conditions, proving a general Korn-type inequality for nonlocal gradients. We show that this framework encompasses Eringen's nonlocal elasticity model as a particular case, establishing an explicit connection between the two formulations. Finally, we prove localization results demonstrating that solutions to the nonlocal problems converge to their classical local counterparts in two different regimes: as the interaction horizon vanishes and, in the fractional case, as the fractional parameter approaches one. These results provide a comprehensive and unified mathematical foundation for nonlocal elasticity theories.

AI.tldr: 建立了基于一般径向核的非局部线性弹性理论统一框架，包含Eringen模型作为特例，并证明了非局部解向经典局部解的收敛性。
AI.motivation: 非局部弹性理论在材料科学和连续介质力学中具有重要意义，但缺乏统一的数学框架。本文旨在建立基于一般径向核的非局部线性弹性理论，将Eringen模型等现有理论纳入统一框架，并建立与经典局部弹性的联系。
AI.techniques: 使用非局部梯度算子、径向核函数、形式线性化方法；建立非局部Korn型不等式；采用变分方法处理Dirichlet和Neumann边界条件；通过渐近分析证明局部化结果。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了非局部线性弹性方程组的弱解存在唯一性；2) 证明了非局部梯度的Korn型不等式；3) 展示了Eringen模型是该框架的特例；4) 证明了两种局部化收敛结果：相互作用范围趋于零时，以及分数阶参数趋于1时。
AI.significance: 为非局部弹性理论提供了统一严谨的数学基础，建立了非局部与经典局部弹性之间的联系，为材料科学中的尺度效应和奇异行为建模提供了理论工具。

title: A priori estimates of stable and finite Morse index solutions to elliptic equations that arise in Physics
summary: This thesis studies qualitative properties of solutions to nonlinear elliptic equations of Poisson type with Dirichlet boundary conditions that arise from some physical phenomena, with a particular focus on regularity, stability, and multiplicity of solutions. Building on the modern framework of solution stability and Morse index theory, the work investigates how these notions influence regularity in nonlinear elliptic problems. A central contribution is the construction of a counterexample showing that bounded radial Morse index does not prevent singular behavior of solutions in dimensions three through nine, challenging a natural extension of the Brezis-Vázquez regularity conjecture. In addition, optimal regularity results are established for radial solutions of a non-autonomous Hardy-Hénon equation, identifying the precise range of dimensions for which regularity holds. The thesis also addresses existence and multiplicity results for elliptic equations involving nonlinearities with spatially vanishing coefficients. Under suitable assumptions, the existence of multiple distinct solutions is proved using variational and topological methods. Finally, the thesis outlines several directions for future research, including extensions of stability-based regularity techniques to non-autonomous problems and potential applications of these techniques to field theories arising in theoretical physics.

AI.tldr: 构建反例证明在3-9维空间中，有界径向Morse指数不能保证解的奇异性消失，挑战了Brezis-Vázquez正则性猜想的自然推广。
AI.motivation: 研究非线性椭圆方程（Poisson型）解的正则性、稳定性和多重性，特别关注物理现象中出现的Dirichlet边值问题，探讨稳定性概念和Morse指数理论如何影响非线性椭圆问题的正则性。
AI.techniques: 现代稳定性框架和Morse指数理论、变分方法、拓扑方法、径向解分析、Hardy-Hénon方程的非自治正则性分析、反例构造技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造反例证明在3-9维中，有界径向Morse指数不能阻止解的奇异行为；2. 建立非自治Hardy-Hénon方程径向解的最优正则性结果，确定正则性成立的精确维数范围；3. 证明具有空间消失系数的非线性椭圆方程多重解的存在性。
AI.significance: 挑战了Brezis-Vázquez正则性猜想的自然推广，深化了对稳定性与正则性关系的理解，为非自治椭圆方程的正则性理论提供了新工具，并为理论物理中的场论应用提供了潜在方法。

title: On $α$-entropy solutions of a nonlocal thin film equation: existence and finite speed of propagation
summary: We consider an initial-boundary value problem for a class of nonlocal thin film equations governed by the spectral fractional Laplacian with homogeneous Neumann boundary conditions. We were the first to establish an $α$-entropy estimate for nonlocal thin film equations, which yields essential a priori bounds for the regularity and long-time behavior of weak solutions. By developing a localized version of this estimate, we prove finite speed of propagation, showing that the support of nonnegative solutions remains compact for positive times. Furthermore, we find a sufficient condition for a waiting time phenomenon, whereby the solution remains identically zero in a region for a nontrivial time interval. These results highlight new features in the interaction between nonlocal effects and classical thin film dynamics.

AI.tldr: 首次建立了非局部薄膜方程的α-熵估计，证明了有限传播速度和等待时间现象
AI.motivation: 研究具有谱分数阶拉普拉斯算子的非局部薄膜方程的初边值问题，探索非局部效应与经典薄膜动力学相互作用的新特征
AI.techniques: 建立α-熵估计及其局部化版本，利用先验估计分析弱解的正则性和长时间行为
AI.main_theorems: 1. 首次建立非局部薄膜方程的α-熵估计；2. 证明有限传播速度（非负解的支撑集在正时间内保持紧致）；3. 发现等待时间现象的充分条件（解在区域内保持恒为零的时间区间）
AI.significance: 揭示了非局部效应与经典薄膜动力学相互作用的新特征，为非局部偏微分方程理论提供了新的分析工具和结果

title: Convergence of a two-parameter hyperbolic relaxation system toward the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations
summary: We investigate a two-parameter hyperbolic relaxation approximation to the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations, incorporating a first-order relaxation and the artificial compressibility method. With vanishingly small perturbations of initial velocity, we rigorously prove the simultaneous convergence of fluid velocity and pressure toward the Navier-Stokes limit in the three-dimensional case by constructing an intermediate affine system to obtain the necessary error estimates for the pressure. Furthermore, we extend the velocity convergence analysis to the case of $\mathcal O(1)$ initial velocity perturbations, and establish the global-in-time recovery of the velocity field using a modulated energy structure and delicate bootstrap arguments in both two- and three-dimensional settings.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了双参数双曲松弛逼近不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在三维情况下的同时收敛性，并推广到二维和三维的大初值扰动情形。
AI.motivation: 研究不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的双参数双曲松弛逼近方法，结合一阶松弛和人工可压缩性方法，旨在建立从松弛系统到Navier-Stokes极限的严格收敛性理论。
AI.techniques: 构造中间仿射系统获得压力误差估计，使用调制能量结构和精细的自举论证，处理小扰动和大扰动两种初值情形。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 三维情况下，当初值扰动趋于零时，流体速度和压力同时收敛到Navier-Stokes极限；2. 二维和三维情况下，对于O(1)量级的初值扰动，速度场全局时间恢复收敛。
AI.significance: 为不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的双曲松弛逼近提供了严格的数学基础，建立了压力收敛的误差估计方法，扩展了收敛性分析到更一般的初值条件。

title: Viscosity Solutions in Martinet Spaces
summary: In this paper, we establish the properties of viscosity solutions in Martinet spaces, which lack both the algebraic group law of Carnot groups and the triangular vector fields of Grushin-type spaces. We then prove the uniqueness of viscosity solutions to strictly monotone elliptic PDEs and to the infinite Laplace equation.

AI.tldr: 在缺乏Carnot群代数结构和Grushin型三角向量场的Martinet空间中建立了粘性解的性质，并证明了严格单调椭圆PDE和无穷拉普拉斯方程粘性解的唯一性。
AI.motivation: 研究Martinet空间中的粘性解理论，这类空间既没有Carnot群的代数群结构，也没有Grushin型空间的三角向量场结构，填补了非欧几里得几何中粘性解理论的空白。
AI.techniques: 粘性解方法、比较原理、Martinet空间几何分析、非交换几何中的PDE理论、无穷拉普拉斯算子分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了Martinet空间中粘性解的基本性质；2. 证明了严格单调椭圆PDE粘性解的唯一性；3. 证明了无穷拉普拉斯方程粘性解的唯一性。
AI.significance: 将粘性解理论推广到更一般的非欧几里得几何结构，为研究奇异几何中的偏微分方程提供了新工具，对次黎曼几何和最优控制理论有重要意义。

title: Nonlocal Boundary Value Problems Governed by Symmetric Nonlocal Operators
summary: Nonlocal boundary value problems with Dirichlet or Neumann boundary are well-studied for nonlocal operators of the type $\mathcal{L}_γu = \operatorname{PV} \int_{\mathbb{R}^d} \big(u(\cdot)-u(y)\big) γ(\cdot,y) \, \mathrm{d}y$ where the underlying kernel function $γ: \mathbb{R}^d \times \mathbb{R}^d \rightarrow [0,\infty)$ is assumed to be measurable and symmetric. In this paper, a theory is introduced for problems whose governing operator is of the more general type \[\mathcal{L}u:= \operatorname{PV} \int_{\mathbb{R}^d}\big(u(\cdot)-u(y)\big) \, K(\cdot, \mathrm{d}y)\] where ${K: \mathbb{R}^d \times \mathcal{B}(\mathbb{R}^d) \rightarrow [0,\infty]}$ is a symmetric transition kernel. Our main focus is on nonlocal Dirichlet and Neumann problems and a classical Hilbert space approach is developed for solving designated weak formulations. As an example, the discrete Poisson problem on $Ω=(0,1)^d$ is discussed.

AI.tldr: 该论文为非局部算子理论引入了一个更一般的框架，将核函数推广到对称转移核，并发展了求解非局部Dirichlet和Neumann问题的Hilbert空间方法。
AI.motivation: 传统的非局部边界值问题研究主要针对特定类型的非局部算子，其核函数是固定的对称可测函数。本文旨在将这一理论推广到更一般的算子类型，其中核被替换为对称转移核，从而建立更广泛的非局部问题理论框架。
AI.techniques: 使用Hilbert空间方法处理弱形式问题，发展了基于对称转移核的非局部算子理论，包括Dirichlet和Neumann问题的弱形式求解框架。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了基于对称转移核的非局部算子理论框架，发展了求解非局部Dirichlet和Neumann问题的Hilbert空间方法，并以离散Poisson问题为例进行了具体讨论。
AI.significance: 将非局部算子理论从传统的核函数框架推广到更一般的转移核框架，为研究更广泛的非局部问题提供了理论基础，扩展了非局部偏微分方程的研究范围。

title: Lane--Emden Systems with Singular Nonlinearities for the Fully Nonlinear Elliptic Operator
summary: Consider \[ \begin{cases} F(D^2 u,Du,u,x) = u^{-p}v^{-q},~\text{in}~Ω\\ F(D^2 v,Dv,v,x)=u^{-r}v^{-s},~~\text{in}~~Ω\\ u,v>0~~\text{in}~~Ω\\ u=v=0~\quad~\text{on}~~\partialΩ, \end{cases} \] where $Ω$ is an open connected subset of $\mathbb{R}^{N}$ and $p,s$ are two non-negative and $q,r$ are positive real numbers. This article discuses the conditions in terms of the relations among $p,q,r$ and $s$ which lead to existence, uniqueness and non-existence of positive solutions to the system. Furthermore, we also have studied some regularity properties of solution of the system. These results are inspired by the study of Lane-Emden system of equations as in \cite{busca2002liouville,ghergu2010lane}.

AI.tldr: 研究带负幂次非线性项的完全非线性椭圆方程组在边界条件下的存在性、唯一性和不存在性条件
AI.motivation: 该论文研究完全非线性椭圆方程组，其中非线性项具有负幂次形式u^{-p}v^{-q}和u^{-r}v^{-s}，受到Lane-Emden系统的启发。主要动机是确定参数p,q,r,s之间的关系如何影响正解的存在性、唯一性和不存在性，并研究解的正则性。
AI.techniques: 使用完全非线性椭圆算子理论，包括比较原理、上下解方法、先验估计、正则性理论，以及参数临界值的分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 建立了参数p,q,r,s之间关系决定解存在性、唯一性和不存在性的完整分类定理，包括临界条件、存在性区域和非存在性区域，并给出了解的正则性结果
AI.significance: 将经典的Lane-Emden系统推广到完全非线性椭圆算子框架，为负幂次非线性椭圆系统提供了系统的存在性理论，在非线性椭圆方程和奇异椭圆系统领域具有理论意义
